_description: Default priority sources for industry research. Source packs are domain collections that guide web search toward higher-quality results. default_packs are auto-selected when user provides no explicit preference. Additional packs are available for opt-in via input_card.research_direction.preferred_source_packs.
_search_priority: user-specified domains > user-specified source_packs > default_packs > unrestricted web search
_note: default_packs are intentionally kept narrow (4 packs) to avoid excessive site:domain queries. Users can opt into additional packs per case. The LLM research planner (Phase 2) will auto-select relevant packs based on industry.

china_official.description: China official government and regulator sources

china_capital_markets.description: China A-share / HKEX company disclosures, filings, and market data

china_financial_data.description: China financial data platforms and research report aggregators. Opt-in via preferred_source_packs.

global_official.description: Global official statistics and multilateral sources

global_market_research.description: Independent market research platforms and syndicated data providers. Distinct from consulting firms — these publish structured market data, not advisory reports. Opt-in via preferred_source_packs.

asia_pacific_official.description: Asia-Pacific government statistics, central banks, and securities regulators. Opt-in when target is in Japan, Korea, India, or Southeast Asia.
